; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_gcd
define i32 @InputKt_gcd(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_3 = alloca i32
  %merge_5 = alloca i32
  store i32 %arg0, ptr %merge_3
  store i32 %arg1, ptr %merge_5
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t0 = load i32, ptr %merge_5
  %t1 = add i32 0, 0
  %t2 = icmp ne i32 %t0, %t1
  br i1 %t2, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t3 = load i32, ptr %merge_5
  %t4 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t5 = load i32, ptr %merge_5
  %t6 = srem i32 %t4, %t5
  store i32 %t6, ptr %merge_5
  store i32 %t3, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb1
bb3:
  %t7 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  ret i32 %t7
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 12
  %t1 = add i32 0, 8
  %t2 = call i32 @InputKt_gcd(i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 100
  %t5 = add i32 0, 75
  %t6 = call i32 @InputKt_gcd(i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t6)
  %t8 = add i32 0, 17
  %t9 = add i32 0, 13
  %t10 = call i32 @InputKt_gcd(i32 %t8, i32 %t9)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t10)
  ret i32 0
}
